results.label: Conservative: 5% / 15% cap
results.description: 10M capital, buy 500K per signal, max 1.5M original cost per symbol.

results.label: Base: 6.5% / 17.5% cap / 10% cash reserve
results.description: 10M capital, buy 650K per signal, max 1.75M per symbol, preserve 1M cash when possible.

results.label: Aggressive: 7% / 17.5% cap / 10% cash reserve
results.description: 10M capital, buy 700K per signal, max 1.75M per symbol, preserve 1M cash when possible.

results.label: Over-aggressive: 7.5% / 20% cap
results.description: 10M capital, buy 750K per signal, max 2M per symbol, no cash reserve.

results.label: Ramp aggressive: 3M 1M/750K/500K
results.description: First three months deploy faster: buy 1M when cash is above 3M, 750K normally, 500K when cash is tight; max 2.25M per symbol.

recommended.label: Ramp aggressive: 3M 1M/750K/500K
recommended.description: First three months deploy faster: buy 1M when cash is above 3M, 750K normally, 500K when cash is tight; max 2.25M per symbol.
